name: Beverly Schaffer
message: Happy Birthday River. River has a beautiful tender heart. When he was very young he overheard his mother mentioning something that hurt her heart and in the background I hear a little voice telling her he would handle it ♥️

name: Mauricio
message: Happy birthday River! I hope today is filled with a lot of happiness, joy, and wonderful memories for your birthday today. Don’t go too crazy and have a lot of fun on your special day.

name: Julia
message: Hail yeah, it’s your birthday!! I was gonna tell a joke about a roof, but it would go over your head.

name: Eddie Cruz
message: Happy Birthday River! I wish you all the best.

name: Brian Dearing
message: Wishing you the best on your special day. Happy birthday bro!

name: Dre Restrepo
message: River! Happy birthday! 🥳🎈 Hope you enjoy the big day. Welcome to the 3rd floor!

name: Eric Smith
message: Wishing you all the best on your special day. Here is to your next thirty Brother!! Now get back to work and make that money. Ha seriously relax and enjoy — work will be there.

name: Stone Jorquera
message: I hope you have a good 30th birthday. Time is only a reminder that we are limited by it. Everything you’re doing with your time now is leading you in the right direction and I am excited to see where it will take you in the future.

name: Lacy Jorquera
message: To your surprise you made it to 30, welcome to the club!!! May this year be full of health, wealth, and small wheels of cheese. Happy Birthday River!!!

name: Andy Sims
message: River - you are crushing life and I hope you have another amazing year! God bless you brother
